name: Country Club Hospitality & Holidays Limited
summary: Country Club Hospitality & Holidays Limited provides leisure hospitality membership services in India. The company sells vacation ownership and other related services. It also provides clubbing hub, holiday destination, fitness center, and entertainment event services. The company has approximately 50 clubs, resorts, and hotels in India, the Middle East, Bangkok, and Sri Lanka. The company was formerly known as Country Club (India) Limited and changed its name to Country Club Hospitality & Holidays Limited in December 2014. Country Club Hospitality & Holidays Limited was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Hyderabad, India.
